action: Codified score caps in audit rubrics — deterministic max_score field per Ghosh 2026 'critic cannot override' principle
operator_note: BLOCKED-BY: c40 (cites the dossier). Closes the 'verdict drift' gap where Auditor's prose judgment can mask missing tests/docs/security checks. Scope (3 files, ~150 LoC): (1) scripts/verification/eval-quality-check.sh MODIFY +60 LoC — parse score_cap field from eval markdown YAML frontmatter. Schema: 'score_cap: { criterion: "X test exists", max_if_missing: 6, evidence: "find scripts/tests/X-test.sh" }'. Multiple caps allowed (lowest cap wins). Parser lands at line 100-150 area where rigor classification already runs. (2) agents/evolve-auditor.md MODIFY +40 LoC — add 'Score Cap Enforcement' subsection after 'Eval Integrity and Rigor' (currently lines 127-142). Rule: if any cap evaluates true (evidence test FAILS), Auditor's final per-criterion verdict is capped at min(verdict, cap.max_if_missing). Caps override prose-quality reasoning — deterministic structural rule. (3) .evolve/evals/_example-score-caps.md NEW ~50 LoC — reference eval showing 3 codified cap patterns: (a) test-file-must-exist cap (max 6 if find scripts/tests/X.sh returns empty), (b) docs-must-mention-X cap (max 7 if grep -q X docs/ returns false), (c) regression-suite-must-pass cap (max 5 if bash scripts/tests/regression.sh returns nonzero). Citation: dossier section 'Adoption 1: Codified Score Caps'. Verification: synthetic eval with max_score=6-if-no-test-file present; build a fake passing eval-result lacking the test; run eval-quality-check.sh; assert cap fires and Auditor verdict ≤6 regardless of prose. Hookpoint context: agents/evolve-auditor.md:127-142 (Rigor Check), scripts/verification/eval-quality-check.sh:100-150.
